title: Manufacturing Engineer - Jain Irrigation - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Jain Irrigation - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Jain Irrigation has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Jain Irrigation:
Jain Irrigation is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jain Irrigation!
